title: Oscar's Zombie Apocalypse
description:
bored of the same zombie modpacks?
thats why we made [OZA] the best zombie modpack and the most optimized to!
body:
## Description Oscar's Zombie Apocalypse adds tons of mods that will change the whole Minecraft experience, Well-optimized insane guns and new biomes, new chests, barrels, shulkers, better animation, and more. Check it out! - Timeless and classics Zero, farmers delight, guard villagers, and more! - Military Armor Vanilla Friendly Aircrafts!
Spoiler
## Notes 1. The modpack comes with config file that changes the mob spawn mechanics. 2. It also comes with the same settings that I am using, so take a look at it before starting your game! 3. **DONT ADD OR REMOVE MODS UNLESS YOU KNOW WHAT YOUR DOING THE MODPACK MAY NOT WORK IF SOME CHANGES HAPPENS!** ## System Requirements ### Minimum - **CPU** : 2 Core 4 thread's Processor. - **RAM** : 4 Gb of ram. - **GPU** : 500mb vram (can run on a potato integrated GPU). - **Storge** : Hdd 10Gb, But it might be slow to launch the game. ### Recommended - **CPU** : 4 Core 8 thread's Processor. - **RAM** : 6 Gb of ram. - **GPU** : 1Gb vram (Iris Xe iGPU). - **Storge** : M.2 10Gb , Sdd Works to. ## FAQ - I made this mod pack because the other Zombie mod packs are usually for older versions or they don't work well on low PCs, and i created OZA modpack,and works well on low pc's
